description.ko: 금빛 생체 발광 수액과 액체 실크 질감으로 박동하는 무중력 유기 장기를 통해 자연의 호흡을 영적으로 탐구한 작품입니다.
description.en: A spiritual exploration of nature's breath, visualized through a weightless organic organ that pulses with golden bioluminescent sap and liquid silk textures.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Bioluminescent Respiratory Synapse.' A massive, translucent organic structure resembling a floating heart-lung hybrid made of #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and #2D5A3D vascular vines. The entity rhythmically pulses, exhaling thick, fluid ribbons of #FFE66D golden liquid light that drift like silk in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent void. Macro focus on the semi-permeable cellular walls where glowing sap channels flow like molten gold. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh to capture a divine, breathing organic flow. 8k resolution.
